channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: EBAL Champs! De La Salle routs Dougherty Valley to win league crown
item.description: David Balogun scores 25 points and grabs 10 rebounds to lead De La Salle to EBAL championship over Dougherty Valley.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Runnin' Utes stun #17 Kansas, 74-67
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Gabe Madsen scored 24 points and became Utah's career leader in made 3-pointers as the Utes beat No. 17 Kansas 74-67 on Saturday night. Madsen's fifth and final 3-pointer of the game with 1:58 to play gave him the Utah career record of 288 made 3s.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 11 Michigan State beats Illinois 79-65; Izzo passes Knight in Big Ten coaching victories
item.description: CHAMPAIGN, Ill. (AP) — Jaxson Kohler had 23 points and 10 rebounds, Tre Holloman scored 14 points and No. 11 Michigan State rallied to beat Illinois 79-65 on Saturday night giving the Spartans' Tom Izzo the most conference wins in Big Ten history.
item.dc:creator: STEVE STEIN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Patrick Rodgers takes the lead at Torrey Pines as Scheffler and McIlroy falter
item.description: Rodgers was at his best Saturday when golf's best were faltering on a tough day at Torrey Pines, playing mistake-free until dumping a gap wedge into the water on the par-5 18th for his only bogey. That gave him a 4-under 68 and a one-shot lead going into the final round.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Adam Silver was surprised about the Doncic-Davis trade, urges angry Mavs fans to keep faith
item.description: NBA Commissioner Adam Silver has a message to those Dallas Mavericks fans who are still angry, two weeks later: He feels your pain.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NHL exec hopes Canadians avoid 'unfortunate situation' of booing US national anthem ahead of rivalry game
item.description: Ahead of Saturday's U.S.-Canada matchup at the 4 Nations Face-Off, an NHL executive is hoping Canada's fans do not boo the U.S. national anthem again.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Pirates ace Paul Skenes is looking to add to his already electric arsenal as he enters Year 2
item.description: BRADENTON, Fla. (AP) — Paul Skenes spent his rookie season dutifully following the Pittsburgh Pirates’ plan to bring their young ace along as slowly and safely as possible. It worked.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Where in the world is 49ers star George Kittle? Montreal for the 4 Nations Face-Off
item.description: The two-time 49ers All-Pro wore Sweden’s yellow jersey with the country’s trademark three crows and Forsberg’s name and No. 9 on the back, along with a hat featuring the Swedish flag and fake yellow and blue hair.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Draymond Green on the state of the NBA: It's 'boring,' the Warriors star says
item.description: Draymond Green had just spoken for a few minutes Saturday morning about the state of the game, about how he believes it’s officiated differently than it once was, how stars don’t get the benefit of being stars like they did in the past.
item.dc:creator: Tim Reynolds, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Shiffrin OK with 5th place despite missing a worlds slalom medal for the first time
item.description: SAALBACH-HINTERGLEMM, Austria (AP) — All that talk about a record-breaking 16th medal. And extending her perfect run of six medals in six career slalom races at the world championships.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Central girls & Grand Junction boys secure wins in rivalry showdown
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — In a thrilling matchup that went to overtime, the Central Warriors edged out Grand Junction 55-51, securing their sixth win of the season. Tied at 44 heading into the extra period, Bianca Berens opened with a mid-range jumper to give Central the lead.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Giants looking to sell minority stake in team: report
item.description: The New York Giants are reportedly looking to sell up to 10% of the team, according to a report from Sports Business Journal published Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Race between Tyreek Hill vs. Noah Lyles moves one step closer. Distance, place and time still TBD
item.description: If they run as fast as they talk, this could be a doozy. Yes, sprint and football fans, Noah Lyles and Tyreek Hill have moved one step closer to settling things on the track. When, where and at what distance? All still TBD.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Carmelo Anthony, Dwight Howard, Sue Bird, Micky Arison, 'Redeem Team' among Hall of Fame finalists
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Carmelo Anthony and Dwight Howard are one step closer to going into the Basketball Hall of Fame. If all goes well, they might get in twice.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Magic Mitoma and Minteh double give Brighton 3-0 win over lackluster Chelsea
item.description: BRIGHTON, England (AP) — Brighton completed a league and cup double over Chelsea on Friday after beating the London side 3-0 for the second time in a week.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fraser Bullock, Brad Wilson, Steve Starks to lead organizing committee for 2034 Olympic Games
item.description: State and Olympic officials named a 25-person organizing committee, led by Committee President Fraser Bullock, former House Speaker Brad Wilson, and Utah business executive Steve Starks.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Philadelphia Eagles Super Bowl parade
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — On this Feb. 14, love Hurts. At least in Philadelphia, where swooning Eagles fans are ready to celebrate the Super Bowl champions and MVP quarterback Jalen Hurts across the City of Brotherly Love.
item.dc:creator: MARYCLAIRE DALE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Jazz fall to Clippers in final game before All-Star break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Norman Powell scored a season-high 41 points and James Harden added 32 to lift the Los Angeles Clippers to a 120-116 overtime victory over the Utah Jazz on Thursday night. Harden also had 10 rebounds, seven assists and three steals.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah Warriors kick off 2025 season next week
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - About to begin its eighth season in Major League Rugby, the Utah Warriors are out to improve upon last year's 5-11 record. "I think we do really well this year," said fullback Sione Mahe.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Salt Lake City 'grid system' inspires new Real Salt Lake jersey
item.description: Real Salt Lake has a new look for the 2025 and the 2026 Major League Soccer season and it's inspired by Salt Lake City's grid system.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: White Sox sign veteran CF Michael A. Taylor to 1-year deal
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Center fielder Michael A. Taylor and the Chicago White Sox have agreed to a $1.95 million, one-year contract. Chicago announced the agreement Wednesday. Taylor spent last season with the Pittsburgh Pirates, batting .193 with five home runs, 21 RBI and a .543 OPS in 113 games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Clippers fan hits insane half-court shot to win grand prize
item.description: Ahead of Valentine's Day on Friday, this Los Angeles Clippers fan is reminding you to "shoot your shot.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Jazz turn the tables on Lakers in 131-119 victory
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - What a difference 48 hours make. On Monday, the L.A. Lakers blew away the Utah Jazz in Luka Doncic' Laker debut. But Wednesday in Salt Lake City, it was all Jazz.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: It's a busy week in Colorado Mesa Maverick country
item.description:
Men’s Basketball. Women’s Basketball. Men’s Wrestling. Baseball. Softball. Swimming. Men’s Lacrosse. Women’s Lacrosse.
All eight of those teams are in action this week.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Pistons set franchise record with 42-point halftime lead in 132-92 romp over Bulls
item.description: Malik Beasley made seven 3-pointers and finished with 24 points, and the Detroit Pistons built a franchise-record, 42-point halftime lead on the way to a 132-92 romp over the Chicago Bulls on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Madsen scores 28, but Utes lose at Cincinnati
item.description: CINCINNATI (ABC4 Sports) - Despite 28 points from Gabe Madsen against his former team, the Runnin' Utes fell at Cincinnati Tuesday night, 85-75. Madsen, who began his college career with the Bearcats, made eight three-pointers on 22 attempts, in matching a season high point total.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Egor Demin leads BYU past West Virginia, 73-69
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.V. (ABC4 Sports) - Freshman Egor Demin scored 16 points to lead BYU to a 73-69 win over West Virginia on Tuesday night. Kanon Catchings added 11 points for BYU (16-8, 7-6 Big 12). "Gutsy win by our guys," said BYU head coach Kevin Young.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boxing mogul in talks to stage fight at Alcatraz in San Francisco
item.description: (KRON) -- Five years ago, no one would have thought YouTuber Jake Paul would get in the ring last fall with Mike Tyson -- who is a boxing legend but has been retired for nearly 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Clayton Kershaw to return to Los Angeles Dodgers: reports
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers legend Clayton Kershaw is returning to the defending World Series champions for the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Super Bowl LIX highlights: Memorable plays, moving tributes and a historic presidential visit
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles defeated the Kansas City Chiefs 40-22 in the first Super Bowl to be held in New Orleans in a dozen years. It was played amid heavy security — and with President Donald Trump in attendance — just 41 days after a man plowed a truck into New Year's revelers on Bourbon Street.
item.dc:creator: Brett Martel, Fox 5

item.title: Super Bowl losers' merch passed to other nations
item.description: The NFL plans for both outcomes so they're ready regardless of who wins. What that inevitably means is a whole lot of merchandise that's pre-printed and pre-made – but fans won't ever be able to buy it.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: PHOTOS: Celebrities spotted at the Super Bowl
item.description: The players on the field Sunday at Super Bowl LIX are celebrities in their own right, but they're far from the only big names gathered in New Orleans for the Chiefs-Eagles matchup.
item.dc:creator: Alix Martichoux, NewsNation

item.title: Eagles beat Chiefs 40-22 in lopsided Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs wanted to make history with three back-to-back-to-back championships, but Super Bowl LIX was dominated by the Philadelphia Eagles, who won the game 40-22.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, NewsNation

item.title: A major Lakers trade was rescinded. Here's why
item.description: The night before the NBA trade deadline, the Los Angeles Lakers parted ways with a young, budding star and a draft pick in exchange for a center.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5
